extensions.name: vidIQ Vision for YouTube

extensions.description: Use Bitmoji anywhere on web!

extensions.name: Fluff Busting Purity

extensions.description: 從 Instagram、Facebook 下載故事，還可以儲存影片或照片。運行具有所有功能的桌面版 Instagram。

extensions.name: Viewstats - YouTube video & channel analytics

extensions.description: Growman enables you to extract Emails from IG based on followers/followings, locations, and hashtags.

extensions.name: Channel Blocker
extensions.description: Allows you to block YouTube™ videos and comments by blacklisting users and/or by using regular expressions.

extensions.name: Influencer Analytics by Wednesday
extensions.description: Free plugin for influencer marketing analytics and creator discovery with detailed profile insights.

extensions.name: GIPHY for Gmail

extensions.name: Seamless.AI

extensions.description: Watch together!

extensions.name: FoxClocks
extensions.description: FoxClocks shows times around the world at the bottom of your browser. It deals with daylight saving time so you don't have to.
